      Modifier and Type Field Description

      private java.util.List<WebpChunk> WebpHandler.chunks

      Modifier and Type Method Description
      java.util.List<WebpChunk> WebpHandlerOrig.getChunks()
      Retrieves a list of active chunks.
      java.util.List<WebpChunk> WebpHandler.getChunks()
      Retrieves a list of active chunks.
      java.util.Optional<WebpChunk> WebpHandlerOrig.getFirstChunk(WebPChunkType type)
      Finds and returns the first occurrence of a chunk matching the specified type.
      java.util.Optional<WebpChunk> WebpHandler.getFirstChunk(WebPChunkType type)
      Finds the first occurrence of a chunk by type.
      java.util.Optional<WebpChunk> WebpHandlerOrig.getLastChunk(WebPChunkType type)
      Finds and returns the last occurrence of a chunk matching the specified type.
      java.util.Optional<WebpChunk> WebpHandler.getLastChunk(WebPChunkType type)
      Finds the last occurrence of a chunk by type.
